summary: Offers and Package Enhancement Testing Complete - All features verified. Offers CRUD works via API, Offers tab in UI shows offer list with validity dates and status badges, Package modal shows new toggles for Partial Payments, Discounts, and Offers with conditional fields when enabled.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span> - This is a console warning in React dev mode, not affecting functionality

offers_crud_api.details: GET /api/offers, POST /api/offers, PUT /api/offers/{id}, PATCH /api/offers/{id}/toggle-status, DELETE /api/offers/{id} all working

offers_active_api.details: GET /api/offers/active returns only active and valid offers within date range

offers_tab_ui.details: Offers tab visible in Settings > Inspection Packages, shows offers list with name, discount, validity dates, and status badges (Active/Upcoming/Expired)

create_offer_modal.details: Create Offer modal shows all required fields: name, description, discount_type (dropdown), discount_value, valid_from, valid_until dates, is_active checkbox

christmas_offer_exists.details: Christmas Special 2026 offer found in database with 20% off, valid from 12/1/2026 to 12/31/2026, showing 'Upcoming' status

package_partial_payment_fields.details: Package modal shows 'Allow Partial Payments' toggle. When enabled, shows Type (percentage/fixed) dropdown and Value input

package_discount_fields.details: Package modal shows 'Allow Discounts' toggle. When enabled, shows Type (percentage/fixed) dropdown and Value input

package_offers_fields.details: Package modal shows 'Allow Offers' toggle. When enabled, shows list of active offers to multi-select with checkboxes

package_create_with_partial_payment.details: API test confirmed package creation with allow_partial_payment=true, partial_payment_type='percentage', partial_payment_value=50

package_create_with_linked_offers.details: API test confirmed package creation with allow_offers=true and applicable_offer_ids array containing offer IDs

test_classes: TestOffersCRUD - 7 tests PASS (CRUD operations, toggle status, active offers filter)
TestPackageEnhancements - 6 tests PASS (partial payment, discount, offers, all features combined)

critical_code_review_comments: Offer models (OfferBase, OfferCreate, OfferUpdate, Offer) correctly defined in inspection_package.py
Package model correctly includes new fields: allow_partial_payment, partial_payment_type, partial_payment_value, allow_discount, discount_type, discount_value, allow_offers, applicable_offer_ids
Offers API endpoints (/api/offers) handle CRUD properly with country_id filtering
Frontend InspectionPackagesPage.jsx has proper UI for all 3 tabs (Packages, Categories, Offers)
Conditional rendering in Package modal - when toggle is ON, additional config fields appear
Multi-select for offers in package modal using checkboxes
data-testid attributes present for key elements (offers-tab, create-offer-btn, package-modal, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Created UI Test Offer via frontend for UI testing - cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offers CRUD and Package enhancement features fully implemented and tested. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_offers_packages.py covers all API scenarios. UI has proper tabs and modals with data-testid attributes for automated testing.
